TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify that UUT as Dual NIC Primary Device that has incorrect specified AVLAN address gives appropriate error message
TestCaseInfo.SuiteType: Matrix Q xi - FOX3 - Hardware Validation
TestCaseInfo.UserStory: TOOL-3303 (Matrix Q xi - FOX3 - Hardware Validation)
TestCaseInfo.TestCaseHeader: Verify that UUT as Dual NIC Primary Device that has incorrect specified AVLAN address gives appropriate error message

VerifyMessage.MessageText: Matrix Q xi - FOX3 : 10.117.18.1 - Incorrect Address : Specified: 10.114.89.246, Required: FOX3_Qxi_AVLAN. The specified device address must match the live address in order to build and upload to it.
